pr.title: Non-record: Full GPTQ + XSA-4 + Score-First TTT (3-seed mean 1.1198)

output.summary: Combines Hessian-aware GPTQ, XSA on the last four layers, and score-first TTT with EMA/SWA blending to adapt int6 weights within the 10-minute regime.
output.valOnlyReasoning: Score-first TTT sequentially scores validation chunks under inference_mode and then trains on those chunks, so adaptation happens using only validation shards.
techniques: Hessian-aware GPTQ calibration with Cholesky error compensation
XSA applied to the final four layers for extended contextual attention
Score-first TTT with AdamW chunked adaptation and EMA+SWA weight blending
